parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching conversation watchers in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is member of conversation whose watchers are to be fetched.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation whose watchers are to be fetched.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of watchers to be fetched.Allowed values are [1,20]

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of watchers to be skipped before fetching watchers(used for paging).

parameters.name: searchTag
parameters.description: Specifies a search tag to filter the conversation watchers.

get.description: Get conversation watchers(members who are online) in a project in an account.

get.summary: Get public conversations in which user is not a member.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching public conversations in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user to identify public conversations of which user is not member already.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Specifies a comma-separated string of conversation IDs to retrieve.

parameters.name: customType
parameters.description: Specifies a string of custom type to filter the conversations.

parameters.name: searchTag
parameters.description: Specifies a search tag to filter the conversations.

parameters.name: membersIncluded
parameters.description: Specifies a comma-separated string of one or more user IDs to restrict search scope.

parameters.name: membersExactly
parameters.description: Searches for conversations with the specified members exactly in. The string should contain comma-separated multiple user IDs.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specifies the sorting criteria for the returned results.Allowed values are 1 and -1.Default is descending order, -1

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Specifies the number of results you want to skip from the beginning. (Useful in Pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of results to return.

parameters.name: includeMembers
parameters.description: Whether to include member details for the conversation.

parameters.name: membersSkip
parameters.description: Specifies the number of members you want to skip from the beginning.Used only if includeMembers is true. (Useful in Pagination).

parameters.name: membersLimit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of members to return.Used only if includeMembers is true.

get.description: Get public conversations in which user is not a member in a project in an account.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching conversation details in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is member of conversation whose details are to be fetched.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation whose details are to be fetched.

parameters.name: includeMembers
parameters.description: Whether to include conversation's member's details.

parameters.name: membersSkip
parameters.description: Specifies the number of members you want to skip from the beginning.Used only if includeMembers is true. (Useful in Pagination).

parameters.name: membersLimit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of members to return.Used only if includeMembers is true.

get.description: Get conversation details in a project in an account.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching conversations count in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user whose conversations count are to be fetched.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Specifies a comma-separated string of conversation IDs to retrieve.

parameters.name: conversationType
parameters.description: Specifies the type of conversation. Allowed values are private, public and open(0,1 and 2). By default, all the conversations are retrieved.

parameters.name: isGroup
parameters.description: Restricts the search scope to only retrieve private 1-to-1 or group conversations. Allowed values are true and false. By default, all the conversations are retrieved.

parameters.name: customType
parameters.description: Specifies a string of custom type to filter the conversations.

parameters.name: searchTag
parameters.description: Specifies a search tag to filter the conversations.

parameters.name: membersIncluded
parameters.description: Specifies a comma-separated string of one or more user IDs to restrict search scope.

parameters.name: membersExactly
parameters.description: Searches for conversations with the specified members exactly in. The string should contain comma-separated multiple user IDs.

get.description: Get conversations count in a project in an account.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching conversations in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user whose conversations are to be fetched.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Specifies a comma-separated string of conversation IDs to retrieve.

parameters.name: conversationType
parameters.description: Specifies the type of conversation. Allowed values are private, public and open(0,1 and 2). By default, all the conversations are retrieved.

parameters.name: isGroup
parameters.description: Restricts the search scope to only retrieve private 1-to-1 or group conversations. Allowed values are true and false. By default, all the conversations are retrieved.

parameters.name: customType
parameters.description: Specifies a string of custom type to filter the conversations.

parameters.name: searchTag
parameters.description: Specifies a search tag to filter the conversations.

parameters.name: membersIncluded
parameters.description: Specifies a comma-separated string of one or more user IDs to restrict search scope.

parameters.name: membersExactly
parameters.description: Searches for conversations with the specified members exactly in. The string should contain comma-separated multiple user IDs.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specifies the sorting criteria for the returned results.Allowed values are 1 and -1.Default is descending order, -1

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Specifies the number of results you want to skip from the beginning. (Useful in Pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of results to return.

parameters.name: includeMembers
parameters.description: Whether to include member details for the conversation.

parameters.name: membersSkip
parameters.description: Specifies the number of members you want to skip from the beginning.Used only if includeMembers is true. (Useful in Pagination).

parameters.name: membersLimit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of members to return.Used only if includeMembers is true.

get.description: Get conversations in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is updating title of conversation.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Body parameters for updating title of a conversation.

parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.description: Token of the user who is updating settings of conversation.

parameters.description: Body parameters for updating settings of a conversation.

get.summary: Fetch presigned url for uploading cover image of a conversation.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used to fetch presigned url for uploading cover image of a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is fetching presigned url for uploading cover image of a conversation.

parameters.name: conversationTitle
parameters.description: Title of the conversation for which to fetch presigned url(Mandatory for new conversation image upload).

parameters.name: mediaExtension
parameters.description: Extension of image to be uploaded as cover image of conversation(Without dot).

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation for which to fetch presigned url(Mandatory for existing conversation image upload).

parameters.name: newConversation
parameters.description: Whether to fetch presigned url for a new or existing conversation image upload.

get.description: Fetch presigned url for uploading cover image of a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for updating image of a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is updating image of conversation.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Body parameters for updating image of a conversation.

patch.description: Update image of a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Body parameters for updating details(customType or metadata) of a conversation.

msg.description: Message of list of conversations being fetched successfully.

Config.title: Conversation config details

typingEvents.description: Whether to allow typing message events.

readEvents.description: Whether to allow send/fetch of read/delivery event for messages.

Config.description: Model containing details of the conversation config.

Error_403_create_conversation.title: Error_403_create_conversation

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_create_conversation.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 2 => Allowed members limit shall be exceeded, 3 => Allowed conversation limit shall be exceeded, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_400_update_conversation_title.title: Error_400_update_conversation_title

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_update_conversation_title.description: Conversation not found or not allowed to update conversation title.

update_conversation_title.title: Response of update conversation title request

msg.description: Message of conversation title being successfully updated.

update_conversation_settings.title: Response of update conversation settings request

msg.description: Message of conversation settings being successfully updated.

error.description: The message of the error raised.

body_create_conversation.title: Body of the create new conversation request

typingEvents.description: Whether to enable message typing events for newly created conversation.

searchableTags.description: List containing tags by which conversation can be searched(Maximum 20).

readEvents.description: Whether to enable message delivery/read events for newly created conversation.

pushNotifications.description: Whether to enable push notifications for newly created conversation.

metaData.description: Metadata of the conversation, if any.

members.description: List containing ids of all the members to be added to newly created conversation.It doesn't contains the id of the user who is creating conversation as well.

isGroup.description: Whether conversation to be created is a group or not.

customType.description: Custom type of the conversation, if any.

conversationType.description: Type of conversation to be created.Allowed value are 0,1 and 2.(private-0, public-1 and open-2)

conversationTitle.description: Title of the conversation, required for all other conversations except private one-one conversation.

conversationImageUrl.description: Image of the conversation, required for all other conversations except private one-one conversation.

body_create_conversation.description: Details of the create new conversation request.

Error_400_update_conversation_image.title: Error_400_update_conversation_image

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_update_conversation_image.description: Conversation not found or not allowed to update conversation image.

body_update_conversation_settings.title: Body of the update conversation settings request

typingEvents.description: Whether to allow typing message events.

readEvents.description: Whether to allow send/fetch of read/delivery event for messages.

conversationId.description: Id of the conversation to update settings of.

body_update_conversation_settings.description: Details of the update conversation settings request.

Error_409_create_conversation.title: Error_409_create_conversation

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_409_create_conversation.description: Private one to one conversation already exists.

Conversation.title: Conversation details

updatedAt.description: Epoch time at which conversation was last updated at.

unreadMessagesCount.description: Number of unread messages in conversation for the given user.

searchableTags.description: List containing tags by which conversation can be searched.

privateOneToOne.description: Whether given conversation is provate one to one.

metaData.description: Object containing metadata of the conversation if present otherwise null.

membersCount.description: Number of members in the conversation.

lastReadAt.description: Object containing details of last time at which a message in given conversation has been read by respective user.

lastMessageDetails.description: Object containing details of the last message in conversation.

isGroup.description: Whether conversation is group or one-one conversation.

customType.description: Custom type of conversation if present otherwise null.

createdByUserName.description: Name of the user who created the conversation.

createdByUserImageUrl.description: Url of the image of the user who created the conversation.

createdBy.description: Id of the user who created the conversation.

conversationTitle.description: Title of conversation.null for private one-one conversations.

conversationImageUrl.description: Image of conversation.null for private one-one conversations.

adminCount.description: Number of admins in the conversation.

Conversation.description: Model containing details of the conversation fetched.
